lighting.direction: Top-side light / Top-backlight from 10 o'clock position
lighting.shadow_character: Deep, sharp-edged shadows with high contrast

color.grading_style: Digital high contrast style with crushed blacks and emphasized teal tones

composition.angle: Top-down view (Flat Lay) with a slight angle (~80 degrees)
composition.focus_point: Central plate with whole and sliced lemons
composition.composition_rule: Rule of Thirds, Diagonal Composition, Frame within a Frame

texture.detail_rendering: Vivid rendering of lemon peel texture, wet leaf surfaces, and background texture

improvement_notes: For a more commercial look, add a soft fill light to soften shadows. For an organic feel, reduce saturation and contrast. To simplify the composition, remove the secondary plate on the bottom right.
nano_banana_prompt: food photography of [YOUR FOOD], flat lay composition with a slight top-down angle, dramatic hard lighting from a single top-left source creating long, sharp, deep shadows, high contrast chiaroscuro effect, caustic light patterns projected from a glass of water, on a deep teal textured background, vibrant complementary color scheme, editorial and sophisticated mood, shot on Kodak Ektar 100, 85mm lens, tack sharp details, rich textures, hyper-realistic --style raw --ar 4:5
